_comment: DevReady curated catalog. Every entry here is a project a non-technical user can install with one click, so additions MUST be vetted and ideally CI-tested (try `devready start` on a fresh clone) before being listed. Keep descriptions plain-language. `repo` is the clone URL; `category` groups it in the GUI; `tags` feed search. This file is the SAFE default surface — open GitHub search is a separate, clearly-warned 'advanced' path.

projects.name: Open WebUI
projects.description: A friendly, self-hosted chat interface for running local AI models (works with Ollama and OpenAI-compatible APIs).

projects.name: Gradio
projects.description: Build and share machine-learning demos with a web UI in a few lines of Python.

projects.name: FastAPI
projects.description: A modern, fast web framework for building APIs with Python. Great starting point for a backend.

projects.name: Excalidraw
projects.description: A virtual whiteboard for sketching hand-drawn-style diagrams. Runs entirely in your browser.

projects.name: Streamlit
projects.description: Turn data scripts into shareable web apps in minutes — no front-end experience required.

projects.name: Whisper
projects.description: Robust speech-to-text: transcribe audio and video files into text in many languages.
